title: Rental Contract
subtitle: Download, sign, and upload your rental agreement
rentalAgreementDesc: Download the rental contract, review all terms carefully, sign it, and upload the signed copy below.

importantNotes.title: Important Notes
importantNotes.readCarefully: Please read the entire contract carefully before signing
importantNotes.bothParties: Both parties must sign the contract for it to be valid
importantNotes.keepCopy: Keep a copy of the signed contract for your records
importantNotes.contactSupport: Contact support if you have any questions or concerns
importantNotes.effectiveDate: The contract becomes effective on the start date specified

toasts.submitted: Contract submitted for review. You will be notified once approved.
toasts.uploadFirst: Please upload the signed contract first
